历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 16342→17501→17796→16760→18291, showing an overall backward trend. In the past two years, it moved from 16760 to 18291, a cumulative backward shift of about 1531 places. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 18291. The provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 11 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 5 in 2024, and 5 in 2025, gradually decreasing and then stabilizing.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science Main Ranking 2025: 180th, 2026: 177th, a slight increase of 3 places, indicating stable improvement in overall strength. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving a sports event controversy (CUVA men's volleyball final home court dispute), but it falls within the realm of sports competition, with limited impact on the psychology of general arts and science applicants. Douyin popularity ranking: 18th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting high application attention. Sports science is an A+ discipline (fourth round evaluation), top in the country. The enrollment majors are mainly data science and rehabilitation physical therapy, which have a general correlation with the core advantages of sports science.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication and other majors are highly recommended in social heat. Data science and big data technology is a popular direction. Rehabilitation physical therapy belongs to medical technology, with a hot social heat. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in the province is about 229,000, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (173,000), significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the significant increase of about 32% in provincial physics category candidates in 2026 leading to intensified competition, the high Douyin heat reflecting increased attention, and the positive signal of a slight rise in Soft Science ranking, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 18291. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 18491, with a range of 17991–18991.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 北京体育大学在云南省医学类（康复物理治疗）历年最低录取位次分别为：2021年15647名（计划3人）、2022年15259名（计划2人）、2023年13135名（计划2人）、2024年16760 名（计划3人）、2025年18291名（计划3人）。整体呈波动上升趋势，2023年出现短暂回落，但2024-2025年连续两年大幅回升，2025年达到历史最高位次。2026年医学类招生计划 为3人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化，但近年医学类报考热度持续走高，供需关系偏紧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京体育大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家211工程重点建设高校，入选国家双一流建设高校，位于北京市。作为国内体育类最高学府，其医学类（康复物理治疗）专业依 托学校在运动科学、康复医学领域的深厚积淀，具有鲜明的学科交叉特色和行业认可度。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 康复物理治疗专业近年来随着健康中国战略推进和全民健身意识提升，报考热度持续上升。该专业在云南省仅招收首选物理、再选化学的考生，选科门槛较高，竞争相对集中。 北京作为一线城市，对云南考生具有较强吸引力，但学校地处北京，生活成本较高，可能对部分考生形成一定制约。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势、2026年招生计划持平以及医学类专业持续升温等因素，预计2026年北京体育大学医学类（康复物理治疗）最低录取位次约为18661名，较2025年略有上升 （位次数字增大，录取难度略增）。波动区间预计在18161名至19161名之间。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The historical minimum admission rankings for Beijing Sport University's Medicine (Rehabilitation Physical Therapy) in Yunnan Province are: 2021: 15647 (planned 3), 2022: 15259 (planned 2), 2023: 13135 (planned 2), 2024: 16760 (planned 3), 2025: 18291 (planned 3). Overall, there is a fluctuating upward trend, with a brief decline in 2023, but a significant rebound in 2024-2025, reaching the highest ranking in 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan for Medicine is 3, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, but the popularity of medical majors has been rising in recent years, leading to a tight supply-demand balance.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Sport University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 211 Project, and selected as a national Double First-Class construction university, located in Beijing. As the highest institution of sports in China, its Medicine (Rehabilitation Physical Therapy) major leverages the university's deep accumulation in sports science and rehabilitation medicine, featuring distinct interdisciplinary characteristics and industry recognition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Rehabilitation Physical Therapy major has seen increasing popularity in recent years with the advancement of the Healthy China strategy and the rise of national fitness awareness. This major only admits candidates with first-choice Physics and second-choice Chemistry in Yunnan Province, with a high subject selection threshold, leading to relatively concentrated competition. Beijing, as a first-tier city, has a strong attraction for Yunnan candidates, but the university's location in Beijing results in higher living costs, which may constrain some candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, and the continued heating up of medical majors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Beijing Sport University's Medicine (Rehabilitation Physical Therapy) in 2026 will be approximately 18661, slightly higher than 2025 (ranking number increases, admission difficulty slightly increases). The fluctuation range is expected to be between 18161 and 19161.

Candidates with rankings within the predicted range can actively apply. This major requires first-choice Physics and second-choice Chemistry, and candidates with color blindness or color weakness are not admitted. Pay attention to physical examination requirements when applying.
